title: How Has VeriSign Stock Performed During The 2022-23 Inflation Shock?
text: It compares these trends to the stock's performance during the 2008 recession.

title: VeriSign (VRSN) Q1 Domain Name Registrations Rise 1% Y/Y
text: VeriSign (VRSN) processes 10.3 million new domain name registrations for .com and .net in the first quarter compared with 10.2 million in the year-ago quarter.

title: 2 Tech Stocks to Buy for Strong EPS Growth
text: Cloud computing provider ServiceNow (NOW) and internet infrastructure services provider Verisign (VRSN) are two worthy candidates in terms of growth.

title: Salesforce Offers Limited Near-Term Upside: 2 Stocks to Buy Instead
text: Salesforce  CRM , the customer relationship management software giant reported earnings on Thursday after the market close. Although CRM beat earnings handily, raised guidance, and returned cash to shareholders the stock sold off, nonetheless.
